name: &CThe Fountain Square&n
description:
&n   You are standing in a large square. At the center of it, there is a
wonderful marble fountain, gushing out a large quantity of clear water.
&n   The Wardome &CDonation Room&n is to the east, the &mCommon Board&n is to the west,
and you see &CThe Center of the Temple Street&n to the south.

extra_descriptions.description: You see the statue of Hill, the Most powerful being ever.
You see the statue of Locky, the Evil Master of War
You see the statue of Zhantar, the Second Master of War
You see a statue of Lothar, the First Master of War
You see the statue of Taerom, the Good Master of War
You see the statue of Arkhon, the Smart Master of War
